steps.title: Identify the key action in context
steps.content: The phrase by devising policies and administering services in accordance with them reveals what the chief and cabinet do with the laws—they actively put them into practice through concrete policies and services.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Implement means to put into effect or execute—exactly what happens when the chief and cabinet turn laws into concrete policies and services. The other choices don't capture this meaning: presume means to assume, improvise means to create without planning, and mimic means to copy. That matches choice A — A is correct.
